name: Somerley Capital Holdings Limited
summary: Somerley Capital Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides corporate finance advisory services in Hong Kong. The company acts as a financial adviser to Hong Kong public listed companies, various shareholders, and investors, as well as parties seeking to control or invest in listed companies in Hong Kong; and financial adviser to independent board committees and/or independent shareholders of listed companies in Hong Kong. It also acts as a compliance adviser primarily for newly listed companies in Hong Kong; a sponsor to initial public offerings and listings of shares of companies on the Stock Exchange in Hong Kong; and an advisor for the cross-border mergers and acquisitions, as well as provides advisory services on secondary equity issues and asset management services. The company offers advisory services related to takeovers of listed companies, acquisitions and disposals, connected transactions, spin-offs and reorganizations, privatizations, initial public offerings, and secondary issues. It serves the conglomerate, consumer, energy, natural resources and infrastructure, renewables, financial institutions and insurance, industrial, property and construction, gaming and hospitality, and TMT industries. The company was incorporated in 2016 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong. Somerley Capital Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Somerley Group Limited.
